text: BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic offers Sports Physiotherapy to athletes of all levels. Our treatment includes injury rehabilitation, performance enhancement, and preventative care. Price: 25,000 Naira per session.

Our Pediatric Physiotherapy service at BodyBalance focuses on developmental delays, cerebral palsy, and musculoskeletal issues in children. We provide a compassionate and supportive environment. Price: 20,000 Naira per session.

Ergonomics assessments at BodyBalance Clinic help corporate professionals prevent back and neck pain. We offer workplace setup advice and postural correction exercises. Corporate rates start at 50,000 Naira for 5 staff members.

Post-Operative Rehabilitation at BodyBalance ensures a safe recovery after surgeries such as ACL reconstruction or joint replacements. Our experts guide you through every step of healing. Price: 30,000 Naira per session.

Pain Management at BodyBalance Clinic uses advanced techniques like dry needling, manual therapy, and therapeutic exercises to manage chronic conditions like sciatica and fibromyalgia. Price: 25,000 Naira per session.
Booking an appointment at BodyBalance is easy. You can message us on WhatsApp at +234 800 BODY BAL or visit our clinic during working hours. Same-day appointments are often available.
BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic is located at 45 Wellness Avenue, Lagos, Nigeria. We are open Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Saturdays from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM.
Sciatica treatment at BodyBalance includes nerve gliding exercises, core strengthening, and posture education to relieve leg pain and numbness. Consultation fee: 10,000 Naira.
Frozen Shoulder (Adhesive Capsulitis) is managed at BodyBalance through progressive stretching, joint mobilization, and heat therapy to restore range of motion. Recovery usually takes 4-8 weeks.

Lower back pain is the most common condition treated at BodyBalance. We focus on identifying the root cause, whether it is a disc issue, muscle strain, or poor posture, and provide targeted exercises.
Knee injuries, including ligament tears and meniscus issues, are treated at BodyBalance with a focus on stability, strength, and gradual return to activity. We provide knee bracing advice.
Posture correction at BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic involves identifying muscle imbalances and prescribing specific exercises to correct 'tech neck' and slumping. We use digital postural analysis.
BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic provides home visits for patients who cannot travel to the clinic. Home service fee starts at 45,000 Naira depending on location within Lagos.
Sports massage at BodyBalance helps in muscle recovery, reducing tension, and improving flexibility. It is recommended for athletes after intense training or competition. Price: 15,000 Naira.
Manual therapy at BodyBalance involves hands-on techniques like joint mobilization and soft tissue manipulation to reduce pain and improve movement. It is included in standard sessions.
Dry needling at BodyBalance Clinic is an effective treatment for trigger points and muscle tightness. It is often combined with other physiotherapy techniques for better results.
Acupuncture for pain relief is available at BodyBalance Clinic, particularly for chronic back and neck pain. It is performed by certified physiotherapists.
Vestibular rehabilitation at BodyBalance helps patients suffering from dizziness, vertigo, and balance disorders. It involves specific eye and head movements.
Pelvic floor physiotherapy at BodyBalance Clinic addresses issues such as incontinence and pelvic pain in both men and women. We ensure absolute privacy and comfort.
Stroke rehabilitation at BodyBalance focuses on restoring movement, strength, and independence through intensive neuro-physiotherapy. Long-term packages are available.
Hydrotherapy advice is provided at BodyBalance for patients who benefit from water-based exercises, particularly for arthritis and severe joint pain.
BodyBalance Clinic offers custom orthotics and insoles for patients with flat feet, plantar fasciitis, or gait abnormalities. Prices start at 40,000 Naira.
TENS (Transcutaneous Electrical Nerve Stimulation) is used at BodyBalance for non-invasive pain relief during recovery from injuries or chronic conditions.
Ultrasound therapy at BodyBalance Clinic promotes tissue healing and reduces inflammation in soft tissue injuries such as tendinitis or bursitis.
Cervical spondylosis treatment at BodyBalance involves neck mobilization, strengthening of deep neck flexors, and ergonomic advice to manage neck pain and stiffness.
Carpal tunnel syndrome is managed at BodyBalance through wrist splinting advice, nerve gliding, and workspace ergonomics to reduce pressure on the median nerve.
Plantar fasciitis relief at BodyBalance Clinic includes calf stretching, foot strengthening, and ultrasound therapy to reduce heel pain.
Scoliosis management at BodyBalance focus on specific exercises to improve spinal alignment and prevent progression in children and adults.
Osteoarthritis management at BodyBalance Clinic involves low-impact exercises, weight management advice, and joint protection techniques to improve quality of life.
BodyBalance provides pre-participation sports physicals to ensure athletes are fit to compete and to identify potential injury risks.
Workshops on workplace wellness and back care are organized by BodyBalance for corporate organizations across Nigeria.
BodyBalance Clinic uses evidence-based protocols for all treatments, ensuring that our patients receive the most effective care possible.
The consultation fee for new patients at BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic is 10,000 Naira, which includes a full assessment and treatment plan.
BodyBalance offers discounted packages for long-term rehabilitation cases, such as 10 sessions for the price of 9.
Patients can request their medical records and progress reports from BodyBalance Clinic for insurance or referral purposes.
BodyBalance Clinic accepts most major health insurance plans in Nigeria. Please check with our front desk for current affiliations.

If you have a sports injury, BodyBalance recommends the P.E.A.C.E & L.O.V.E protocol (Protection, Elevation, Avoid Anti-inflammatories, Compression, Education & Load, Optimism, Vascularisation, Exercise).
Chronic headache management at BodyBalance often involves treating the cervical spine (neck) and addressing postural issues that contribute to tension headaches.
BodyBalance Physiotherapy Clinic is committed to patient education, providing every patient with a home exercise program (HEP) to speed up recovery.
For knee pain, BodyBalance often recommends quadriceps strengthening and hip stability exercises to reduce the load on the knee joint.
To prevent back pain while working, BodyBalance suggests taking a 'micro-break' every 30 minutes to stretch and change position.
